name: Crockpot Pineapple Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Split, skin, and bone the chicken breasts.
2. Drain and remove any bones from the pineapple.
3. Place the chicken in the crockpot.
4. Sprinkle the chicken with pepper and paprika.
5. Mix the soy sauce, drained pineapple, Dijon-style mustard, and minced garlic together.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 to 9 hours or on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
Makes 6 servings
Per serving: 210 calories; 4 g fat; 73 mg cholesterol; 153 mg sodium.
